title: Parisian Nights
writer: Emil Forst, Doty Hobart, Fred Myton
actors: Elaine Hammerstein, Lou Tellegen, Gaston Glass
plot: American sculptress Adele La Rue, working in Paris, lacks the inspiration to create a masterpiece, until Jean Ballard, a wild apache leader, takes refuge from the police in her apartment. Adele saves him from capture on the condit...
